chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2399 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ تُسَافِرْ يَوْمَ اَلْإِثْنَيْنِ وَ لاَ تَطْلُبْ فِيهِ حَاجَةً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2399 - Imam (as) said: "Do not travel on Monday, nor seek any need on that day."
